label: Historical Jesus
description: Jesus as a historical figure, his life, sayings, death, messianic identity, or historicity debates.

description: Matthew, Mark, Luke, John, Synoptic relationships, Gospel narratives, Gospel discrepancies.

label: Paul and Letters
description: Paul, Pauline theology, disputed Pauline letters, other epistles, apostolic correspondence.

label: Acts and Revelation
description: Acts of the Apostles, Revelation, apocalyptic imagery, early mission narratives.

label: Hebrew Bible and Judaism
description: Hebrew Bible, Second Temple Judaism, Jewish law, Jewish groups, Jewish-Christian relations.

label: Early Christianity
description: Christian origins, first centuries CE, church fathers, early Christian communities and practices.

label: Christian Apocrypha
description: Non-canonical gospels, apocryphal acts, infancy gospels, lost scriptures.

label: Greco-Roman World
description: Roman Empire, pagan religions, mystery religions, imperial context, broader ancient Mediterranean culture.

label: Church History
description: Later historical developments, Constantine, councils, Reformation, Christianity after the earliest period.

label: Resurrection
description: Resurrection of Jesus, empty tomb, appearances, bodily/spiritual resurrection.

label: Afterlife
description: Heaven, hell, salvation, eternal life, judgment, death and postmortem existence.

label: Christology
description: Jesus’ divinity, Son of God language, incarnation, Trinity, adoptionism, exaltation.

label: Suffering and Evil
description: Problem of evil, suffering, theodicy, divine justice, pain and belief.

label: Miracles
description: Miracle stories, healings, exorcisms, supernatural claims, ancient wonder-working.

label: Martyrdom and Persecution
description: Martyrs, persecution, Christian suffering, conversion through witness.

label: Heresy and Orthodoxy
description: Competing Christianities, proto-orthodoxy, Gnosticism, doctrinal boundary-making.

label: Canon and Scripture
description: Formation of the canon, scriptural authority, inspired texts, Bible as scripture.

label: Women, Gender, and Sexuality
description: Women in early Christianity, gender roles, sexuality, Mary Magdalene, household and church authority.

label: Spread of Christianity
description: Conversion, mission, growth of Christianity, social explanations for Christian success.

label: Mythicism
description: Claims that Jesus did not exist, mythicist arguments, responses to mythicism.

label: Faith, Doubt, and Belief
description: Faith transitions, doubt, agnosticism, fundamentalism, inerrancy, religious certainty.

label: Textual Criticism
description: Manuscripts, scribes, variants, original text, copying, textual reconstruction.

label: Translation
description: Bible translation, NRSV/KJV issues, Greek/Hebrew wording, translation choices.

label: Authorship and Forgery
description: Pseudonymity, forgery, authorship attribution, who wrote a text.

label: Historical Method
description: Criteria, evidence, dating, source criticism, how historians know things.

label: Memory and Oral Tradition
description: Memory studies, oral transmission, eyewitnesses, tradition development.

label: Archaeology and Material Culture
description: Inscriptions, artifacts, skeletal remains, archaeology, material evidence.

label: Reader Questions
description: Mailbag posts, explicit Q&A, responses to reader questions.

label: Book Discussion
description: Posts about Ehrman’s books, other books, publication excerpts, book arguments.

label: Personal and Autobiographical
description: Ehrman’s life, education, faith journey, career, personal reflections.

description: Classroom teaching, academic work, tenure, graduate study, professional scholarship.

label: Debates and Critics
description: Debates, critics, public disagreements, responses to named interlocutors.

description: Videos, interviews, podcasts, courses, webinar recordings, media appearances.
